name: Molybdenum
best_timing: 建议随餐服用或遵医嘱

raw_content.intake: The amount of molybdenum you need depends on your age. Average daily recommended amounts are listed below inmicrograms(mcg). Life StageRecommended AmountBirth to 6 months2 mcgInfants7–12 months3 mcgChildren 1–3 years17 mcgChildren 4–8 years22 mcgChildren 9–13 years34 mcgTeens 14–18 years43 mcgAdults 19 years and older45 mcgPregnant teens and women50 mcgBreastfeeding teens and women50 mcg
